items.title: Precious Achiuwa Reportedly Chose Kings Over Other Options in Free Agency
items.author: Sports Illustrated
items.body_excerpt: Precious Achiuwa Reportedly Chose Kings Over Other Options in Free Agency Sports Illustrated

items.title: Minnesota and Chicago both expressed strong interest in Precious Achiuwa. Real possibilities.
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Minnesota and Chicago both expressed strong interest in Precious Achiuwa. Real possibilities. 

But Sacramento remained the best fit for him. 💯.

I spent the day in the gym with Precious last week in Miami. He’s ready to compete for a starting spot this season. He’ll be in Las Vegas with the gang

items.title: Sacramento Kings Re-Sign Precious Achiuwa
items.author: NBA.com
items.body_excerpt: Sacramento Kings Re-Sign Precious Achiuwa NBA.com

items.title: Awesome time hanging out with Precious Achiuwa today in the lab. He’s been winning all summer. He just got back from his honeymoon in Croatia.
items.author: Mark Jones
items.body_excerpt:
Awesome time hanging out with Precious Achiuwa today in the lab. He’s been winning all summer. He just got back from his honeymoon in Croatia. 
He tells me he’s spoken to his new team mates and ready to go. Will be with the crew in Las Vegas. 👌🏽

items.title: Continue to hear from league sources that Precious Achiuwa is expected back next season with the Sacramento Kings. Contract details are unknown at this time, but positive momentum for a return.

items.body_excerpt: Continue to hear from league sources that Precious Achiuwa is expected back next season with the Sacramento Kings. Contract details are unknown at this time, but positive momentum for a return.
